title: Mario Gives Up 3 - Release!
description:
The final installment of the MGU trilogy is finally here! This took 9-10 months of work, with bursts of inspiration at points, and weeks of no progress in some other points. Anyways, the links to everything you need is here:

MGU3: http://www.smwcentral.net/?p=section&a=details&id=12683
Forum: http://www.smwcentral.net/?p=viewthread&t=81240&page=1&pid=1253830#p1253830
